debug_info.goal:
inst✝ : Arch
state : SystemState
reqType : BasicRequest
tId : ThreadId
prelimReq : Request := ⋯
previous : List Request := ⋯
removed : List Request := ⋯
occurrences : List Nat := ⋯
req : Request := ⋯
pairedRequest? : Option Request := ⋯
requests' : RequestArray := ⋯
orderConstraints' : OrderConstraints := ⋯
⊢ ∀ (id : RequestId), id ∈ List.map Request.id state.removed → id ∈ reqIds requests'

failed_attempts:
fun id hid => by
       have h := state.removedCoherent id hid
       cases pairedRequest? <;> simp only [requests'] at * <;>
       (repeat apply RequestArray.reqIds_insert_subset); exact h
fun id hid => state.removedCoherent id hid |> RequestArray.mem_insert_of_mem

fun id hid => by
       have := state.removedCoherent id hid
       simp only [requests'] at *
       cases pairedRequest? <;> simp_all

fun id hid => by
       have h := state.removedCoherent id hid
       unfold requests'
       cases pairedRequest? <;> simp_all [reqIds]

fun id hid => by
       have := state.removedCoherent id hid
       exact RequestArray.reqIds_subset_insert _ _ this

fun id hid => by
       have h := state.removedCoherent id hid
       unfold requests'
       split <;> exact RequestArray.reqIds_subset_insert _ _ h

fun id hid => by
       have h := state.removedCoherent id hid
       exact RequestArray.mem_reqIds_insert _ _ h

fun id hid => by
       have h := state.removedCoherent id hid
       cases pairedRequest? <;> simp only [requests'] at * <;>
       exact RequestArray.mem_insert_of_mem _ h

by
       intro id hid
       have h := state.removedCoherent id hid
       simp only [requests']
       cases pairedRequest? <;> exact RequestArray.mem_reqIds_of_mem_insert h
fun id hid => RequestArray.mem_reqIds_of_mem_insert (state.removedCoherent id hid)

fun id hid => by
       have h := state.removedCoherent id hid
       unfold requests'
       cases pairedRequest? <;> simp_all [RequestArray.mem_reqIds_insert_of_mem]

fun id hid => by
       have h := state.removedCoherent id hid
       cases pairedRequest? <;> simp_all [requests', reqIds]
